description: Complete rewrite of all 6 admin screens (Tournaments, Teams, Players, Matches, Contests, Scoreboard) with proper UI patterns, image upload via gallery picker, correct field sets per specification, and Riverpod-safe loading. Also update the admin provider and repository to support new fields and fix the SQL schema.
steps: Step 1: Update admin_repository.dart - Add missing repository methods if needed. The existing repository already has the right Supabase queries. Ensure createMatch returns Map<String,dynamic>? (already does). Ensure createTournament, createTeam, createPlayer accept the new fields. No changes needed since they accept Map<String,dynamic> data. Repository is fine.

Step 2: Rewrite admin_tournaments_screen.dart completely. Requirements: (a) NO FloatingActionButton, (b) NO AppBar create button (only refresh and menu), (c) Large body ElevatedButton.icon for create, (d) Load data using WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback in initState, (e) Local setState for loading (not global isLoading from provider), (f) Empty state when no data (never show 'Failed to load'), (g) Create dialog with fields: Tournament Name, Tournament Logo (gallery picker via image_picker + upload via StorageService to 'tournament-logos' bucket), Tournament Type dropdown (League/Knockout/Practice), Start Date (date picker), End Date (date picker with validation >= Start Date), Total Teams (number), Total Matches (number), Location (text), Description (text), Status dropdown (Upcoming/Live/Completed), (h) List items show: Logo (CircleAvatar with network image), Name, Status chip, Start Date, (i) Actions: Edit, Delete, (j) AdminNavDrawer with currentRoute '/admin/tournaments'.

Step 3: Rewrite admin_teams_screen.dart completely. Requirements: (a) NO FAB, NO AppBar create button, (b) Large body create button only, (c) WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback for loading, (d) Empty state (no 'Failed to load'), (e) Need to load tournaments first for dropdown, (f) Create dialog: Select Tournament (dropdown from loaded tournaments), Team Name, Team Logo (gallery picker + StorageService upload to 'team-logos' bucket), Captain (text), Vice Captain (text), Max Squad Size (default 16), Min Squad Size (default 11), (g) List shows: Logo (CircleAvatar with network image or fallback), Team Name, Captain, (h) Actions: Edit, Delete, (i) AdminNavDrawer currentRoute '/admin/teams'.

Step 4: Rewrite admin_players_screen.dart completely. Requirements: (a) NO FAB, NO AppBar create button, (b) Large body create button only, (c) WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback for loading, (d) Empty state (no 'Failed to load'), (e) Load tournaments then teams for cascading dropdowns, (f) Create dialog: Select Tournament (dropdown), Select Team (dropdown filtered by tournament), Player Name, Role dropdown (WK/BAT/AR/BOWL), Jersey Number (number), Age (number), Profile Image (gallery picker + StorageService upload to 'player-photos' bucket, default avatar if not selected), (g) Enforce max 16 / min 11 players per team, (h) List shows: Photo (CircleAvatar with network image or default icon), Name, Role, (i) Actions: Edit, Delete, (j) AdminNavDrawer currentRoute '/admin/players'.

Step 5: Rewrite admin_matches_screen.dart completely. Requirements: (a) NO FAB, NO AppBar create button, (b) Large body create button only, (c) WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback for loading, (d) Empty state (no 'Failed to load'), (e) Load tournaments and teams for selection, (f) Create dialog: Select Tournament (dropdown), Select Team A (dropdown filtered by tournament), Select Team B (dropdown filtered by tournament, validated != Team A), Match Name auto-generated: 'Team A vs Team B', Date (date picker), Time (time picker), Venue (text), Overs dropdown (5/10/20/50), Status dropdown (Upcoming/Live/Completed), (g) After match creation, show Playing XI selection dialog (select exactly 11 players per team with at least 1 WK), (h) List shows: Teams (team_a_name vs team_b_name), Date, Status chip, (i) Actions: Edit, Delete, (j) AdminNavDrawer currentRoute '/admin/matches'.

Step 6: Rewrite admin_contests_screen.dart completely. Requirements: (a) NO FAB, NO AppBar create button, (b) Large body create button only, (c) WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback for loading, (d) Empty state (no 'Failed to load'), (e) Load matches for selection, (f) Create dialog: Select Existing Match (dropdown), Contest Name, Entry Fee (number), Prize Pool (number), Total Spots (number), Max Teams Per User (number), Contest Type dropdown (Mega/HeadToHead/Small League/Winner Takes All), Auto-calculate: Collected Amount (entry_fee * total_spots), Profit (collected - prize_pool), Winning Distribution (calculated), (g) List shows: Name, Prize Pool, Entry Fee, (h) Actions: Edit, Delete, (i) AdminNavDrawer currentRoute '/admin/contests'.

Step 7: Rewrite admin_scoreboard_screen.dart completely. Keep the existing structure but ensure: (a) NO FAB, NO AppBar create button, (b) Large body create button for adding score entries, (c) WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback for loading matches, (d) Empty state (no 'Failed to load'), (e) Select Match dropdown, (f) Toss Winner dropdown and Bat First toggle, (g) Live scoring fields: Runs, Wickets, Overs, Balls, Extras, Boundaries (4s/6s), (h) Display: Strike Rate, Economy, Current Run Rate, Required Run Rate, Target, Partnership, (i) Player statistics cards with fantasy points auto-calculation, (j) AdminNavDrawer currentRoute '/admin/scoreboard'.

Step 8: Create/update sql/part5-admin-module-complete.sql with any additional schema changes needed beyond part4 - specifically ensuring scoreboard table has all needed columns (overs instead of overs_bowled for consistency with the screens, extras, runs_conceded columns) and any missing indexes.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 admin screens have NO FloatingActionButton
All 6 admin screens have NO AppBar create/add button
All 6 admin screens have ONLY the large body ElevatedButton.icon for creating items
All screens use WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback for initial data loading
All screens use local setState for loading state (not global isLoading)
All screens show empty state when no data (never show 'Failed to load')
Tournament create has all specified fields including gallery image upload
Team create requires tournament selection and has gallery logo upload
Player create requires tournament+team selection and has gallery photo upload with default avatar fallback
Match create has Team A != Team B validation, auto-generated name, and Playing XI selection after creation
Contest create has auto-calculated collected amount and profit
Scoreboard has toss, live scoring with all cricket stats, and auto fantasy points
All image uploads use image_picker for gallery selection and StorageService for Supabase Storage upload
flutter analyze passes with no errors on the rewritten files
verification: Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/dream-11 && flutter pub get && flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos' and confirm no errors in the admin module files
findings: Flutter SDK is not available in this sandbox environment (network restrictions prevent downloading from storage.googleapis.com). Code was written following exact patterns from existing files and verified structurally. All imports reference existing files, all dependencies (intl, image_picker, flutter_riverpod, supabase_flutter) are in pubspec.yaml. Could not run flutter analyze for final verification but code follows same structure as existing admin screens that already pass analysis.
